G

game - module game
 
game - package game
 
Game - Class in game
Main game class that manages the game loop and level transitions.
Game(String[], String) - Constructor for class game.Game
Constructs a new Game instance.
gameOn - Variable in class game.Game
 
generation - package generation
 
generation.characters - package generation.characters
 
generation.map - package generation.map
 
getCols() - Method in class generation.Level
Gets the number of columns in the map.
getEnemies() - Method in class generation.Level
Gets the list of all enemies in this level.
getEnemyAt(int, int) - Method in class generation.Level
Returns the enemy at position (i, j), or null if none is present.
getGameOn() - Method in class game.Game
Checks if the game is currently running.
getHasCoin() - Method in class generation.map.Cell
Checks whether this cell contains a coin.
getInitialPosition() - Method in class generation.characters.Character
Gets the initial spawn position.
getLives() - Method in class generation.characters.Character
Gets the current number of lives.
getMap() - Method in class generation.Level
Gets the map grid.
getMovement() - Method in enum class generation.map.Movement
Returns the movement offsets as an array.
getName() - Method in class generation.characters.Character
Gets the character's name.
getNumberOfCoins() - Method in class generation.Level
Gets the current number of coins remaining.
getNumberOfLevels() - Static method in class generation.Level
Gets the total number of levels created.
getNumberOfPlayers() - Static method in class generation.characters.Player
Gets the total number of players instantiated.
getPlayer() - Method in class generation.Level
Gets the player instance.
getPosition() - Method in class generation.characters.Character
Gets the current grid position.
getPosition() - Method in class generation.map.Cell
Gets the grid coordinates of this cell.
getRequiredKey() - Method in class generation.map.LockedDoor
Gets the key required to unlock this door.
getRows() - Method in class generation.Level
Gets the number of rows in the map.
getScore() - Method in class generation.characters.Player
Gets the player's current score.
getType() - Method in class generation.map.Cell
Gets the type of this cell.
Ghost - Class in generation.characters
Represents a Ghost enemy that moves in a straight line and ignores obstacles.
Ghost(String, int, int[]) - Constructor for class generation.characters.Ghost
Constructs a new Ghost with the given name, lives, and starting position.
